page.title: Finalize run #{run}
page.subtitleOpen: Confirm the closed mass balance, then mint the green lot.
page.subtitleFinalized: This run is finalized — the green lot is minted and costed.
page.subtitlePending: This run is awaiting its reposo / spec readiness gate.

balance.title: Closed mass balance
balance.subtitle: Every kilogram of parchment is accounted for before the run can finalize.
balance.balancedNote: The residual sits inside the per-variety ceiling — this run can be finalized.
balance.unbalancedNote: The unaccounted loss exceeds the per-variety ceiling. Record byproducts / rejects or re-weigh before finalizing.
balance.noData: No mass-balance data yet — record the machine passes first.

form.title: Mint the green lot
form.greenKgHint: Defaults to the final machine-pass output.
form.cuppingHint: Sets the green lot's SCA band; leave blank if not yet cupped.
form.costHint: Flows straight into cost-per-kg-green via the costing ledger.
form.blockedBalance: The mass balance must close before this run can be minted.

grade.title: SCA green grade
grade.subtitle: The prep band is derived from the defect counts — it can never drift from them.

confirm.title: Mint green lot — irreversible
confirm.body: This mints a new green lot from {kg} kg of parchment lot {lot} and posts the milling cost into cost-per-kg-green. It cannot be undone.
confirm.irreversible: A correction is a new run, never an edit — the green lot and its events are append-only.

result.title: Green lot minted
result.costLine: Milling cost is folded into cost-per-kg-green.

regrade.title: Re-grade {code}
regrade.body: Record a fresh SCA grade. The latest grade wins; the old one stays on the append-only ledger.

errors.generic: Could not complete that. Check the details and try again.
errors.greenKgPositive: Enter the green outturn in kilograms.
errors.locationRequired: Enter where the green lot is stored.
errors.defectsInvalid: Defect counts must be zero or a positive whole number.
errors.cuppingInvalid: Cupping score must be a positive number.
errors.lotRequired: This grade has no green lot to attach to.

empty.pendingDescription: Open the milling run from the reposo / spec gate before it can be finalized.
